# UFE (uterine fibroid embolization) ‚Äî accuracy review

**Applied 2026-07-03** as migration `p4_ufe_game_ready` (repo: `db/seed_p4_ufe.sql`, generated by `game/tools`/`gen_ufe_sql.py` from `game/tests/ufe_steps.js`). `data_version` ‚Üí 74. UFE is the **first procedure made playable by pure data entry** ‚Äî no engine/UI code changed. `v_game_ready` now returns chest-port **and** UFE, so the case picker offers a choice.

## What's real vs. modeled (accuracy contract, spec ¬ß1)

| Element | Class | How filled |
|---|---|---|
| **Complications** (nontarget embolization, ovarian insufficiency, post-embolization syndrome, fibroid expulsion, endometritis/pyomyoma, DVT/PE) | **CITED** | **Reused as-is** from the existing UFE `complications` rows you entered. The engine rolls against their rates; nothing invented. Complication *multipliers* per maneuver are MODELED. |
| **Vessel map** `femoral-to-uterine` (CFA‚ÜíEIA‚ÜíCIA‚Üíaortic bifurcation‚Üícontralateral internal iliac‚Üíuterine origin‚Üíuterine target) | **MODELED** | Anatomy path + approximate reference diameters; `tortuosity`/`fragility` are MODELED 1‚Äì10 sim params (uterine 7/6 encodes spasm + nontarget risk). Labeled in the map notes. |
| **Patient generator** | **MODELED** | Premenopausal fibroid population, **explicitly labeled "NOT a real cohort Table 1"**, `source_paper_id` null. Real guardrails reused (CKD-EPI 2021 / Cigarroa contrast / SIR arterial thresholds). Age 43¬±6, all-female, menorrhagia/bulk symptom mix, menorrhagia-anemia Hgb ‚Äî all MODELED. |
| **fluoro_target_min = 15.0** | **MODELED** | Placeholder (UFE is a longer-fluoro case); `fluoro_citation` says replace with a cited UFE DRL. No `reference_dap` yet ‚Üí radiation scores vs the fluoro-minute target. |
| **base_payout 2400 ¬∑ complexity 4 ¬∑ UFE kit** | **DESIGN** | Economy only. Kit = 9 devices (2 already in the starter chest-port kit; 7 bought at procurement ‚Äî the intended buy‚Üíuse loop). |

## The 8 steps (taxonomy-keyed ‚Üí the battle Actions menu)

time-out ‚Üí US-guided CFA access + sheath ‚Üí pelvic DSA ‚Üí reform reverse-curve into the uterine artery ‚Üí superselect past the cervicovaginal branch ‚Üí embolize to near-stasis with calibrated spheres ‚Üí treat the contralateral side ‚Üí completion run + closure. Each step's correct maneuver is a real `action_taxonomy` id (`us-micropuncture`, `dsa`, `reform`, `superselect`, `particles`, `closure-device`‚Ä¶), so it's buried among the ~71 generic moves ‚Äî the player must know the maneuver, not read it off two buttons. Wrong/suboptimal maneuvers (landmark stick, straight catheter, proximal microcatheter, unilateral treatment) proceed and take a score/complication hit.

## Verified

`v_game_ready` = 2; UFE has 8 steps (step-2 best = `us-micropuncture`), a published generator, and the economy kit. Security advisors unchanged (2 known WARNs). Engine test `game/tests/ufe.test.js` (5) green: best path scores 100, wrong maneuver ‚Üí default penalty, nontarget-embolization fires against the CITED row, unilateral treatment is an accepted-but-worse ‚àí5. Full suite 10/10.

## Your to-dos (Ryan)

1. **Clinical review** of the 8 steps (maneuver order, the accepted-vs-penalized options, teaching text).
2. **Cite the generator cohort** (attach a real UFE Table 1 ‚Üí flips the generator MODELED‚ÜíCITED) and a **UFE fluoro/DAP DRL** (replaces the 15-min placeholder).
3. Confirm the MODELED vessel `tortuosity`/`fragility` values feel right.
4. The complication *multipliers* (all currently 1.0) are MODELED knobs ‚Äî tune if desired.
